source_pr.title: planner: DML queries might panic when CTE exists
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #46083

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

The CTE table doesn't have *model.TableInfo. We need to skip it when accessing TableInfo to avoid panic.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Fix the issue that DML queries might panic when CTE exists in the SQL
```

symptoms: Planner can panic on some DML queries when a CTE is present (CTE logical table lacks TableInfo)
failure_signature: Panic due to unexpected nil/missing TableInfo when CTE exists in DML
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR fixes a deterministic planner correctness issue (potential panic when processing DML with CTE because a CTE table does not have a real *model.TableInfo). The case data here does not capture a flaky failure signature beyond the general panic symptom, and mapping it to a flakiness taxonomy category would be speculative. Classify as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: Skip/guard CTE logical tables when accessing TableInfo to avoid panic in DML planning.
analysis:
PR title: planner: DML queries might panic when CTE exists
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/46092
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (3): planner/core/issuetest/BUILD.bazel, planner/core/issuetest/planner_issue_test.go, planner/core/logical_plan_builder.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
